steps.purpose: resolve $ATHLETE to athlete.id + athlete.team.id + athlete.teamAbbrev via the compare lookup
steps.failure_modes: in postseason, compare may return athlete1.team = '' for athletes whose team isn't currently in the playoffs

steps.purpose: team's recent events; pick last completed event
steps.failure_modes: in postseason, teams<id> returns events:[] for non-playoff teams. Use the scoreboard fallback below.

steps.purpose: FALLBACK when step 1 or 2 returns empty in postseason. Scan a window covering the last 30 days of regular season + play-in, filter events for team's abbreviation, take latest completed.
steps.fallback_for: step 1 returns empty team OR step 2 returns events:[]

steps.purpose: per-player stats line for the last completed event
walk boxscore .players[teamIdx].statistics[0].athletes[playerIdx] to find the row
